translations.en: a tall, stern woman, with graying red hair and a perpetual scowl.
translations.zh: 一位身材高挑、神情嚴肅的女子，紅髮夾雜著白絲，眉頭永遠緊鎖。

translations.en: "Well, Avatar. I graciously grant thee another interview."
translations.zh: 「好吧，聖者。吾大方地再賜汝一次覲見的機會。」

translations.en: "I certainly hope thou wilt be more respectful this time."
translations.zh: 「吾希望汝這次能更有禮貌一些。」

translations.en: "Welcome again, worthy Avatar, to my hall."
translations.zh: 「尊貴的聖者，再次歡迎汝蒞臨吾的殿堂。」

translations.en: "Welcome, worthy Avatar, to the Hall of Justice."
translations.zh: 「尊貴的聖者，歡迎汝蒞臨正義大廳。」

translations.en: "How may we assist thee in thy quest?"
translations.zh: 「吾等如何能在汝的任務中提供協助？」

translations.en: "I am Lenora, Lady Mayor of Yew."
translations.zh: 「吾乃萊諾拉，尤城的女市長大人。」

translations.en: "It is my honor to preside over this town and its @courts."
translations.zh: 「主持本城及其@courts（法庭），乃是吾的榮幸。」

translations.en: "We also provide the finest @wood in the realm."
translations.zh: 「吾等亦提供全境最上等的@wood（木材）。」

translations.en: "Go ask Ben the logger."
translations.zh: 「去問伐木工班吧。」

translations.en: "Head west from here into the forest until you can go no further."
translations.zh: 「從這裡向西進入林中，直至無路可走為止。」

translations.en: "Then look for a way through the trees to the north."
translations.zh: 「然後在樹間尋找向北的通道。」

translations.en: "In Yew we take pride in our system of @justice."
translations.zh: 「尤城以吾等的@justice（正義）體制為傲。」

translations.en: "Indeed, the @Rune of Justice itself was sent here for safekeeping."
translations.zh: 「確實，@Rune（符文）聖符本身便被送至此處保管。」

translations.en: "A thief stole the rune from the grave of our most respected resident, the former Lord Mayor."
translations.zh: 「一名盜賊從吾等最受尊敬的居民、前任市長大人的墓中竊走了聖符。」

translations.en: "Even though the @thief was caught, we have not yet found the rune."
translations.zh: 「雖然@thief（盜賊）已被逮捕，但聖符至今尚未尋回。」

translations.en: "The thief is in the jail, awaiting the carriage of justice."
translations.zh: 「盜賊已關押在獄中，等待正義的制裁。」

translations.en: "'Tis most strange, Avatar, that thou knowest not the Mantra of Justice."
translations.zh: 「聖者，汝竟不知正義咒語，此乃咄咄怪事。」

translations.en: "How can that be?"
translations.zh: 「這怎麼可能？」

translations.en: "A letter of permission?"
translations.zh: 「許可信函？」

translations.en: "Dost thou truly need to speak with that reprehensible thief?"
translations.zh: 「汝真的需要與那個無恥盜賊交談？」

translations.en: "What, free the thief in return for the rune? Never!"
translations.zh: 「什麼，以釋放盜賊換取聖符？絕對不行！」

translations.en: "To do so would betray everything the rune itself stands for!"
translations.zh: 「此舉將背叛聖符所代表的一切！」

translations.en: "Better to leave it lost."
translations.zh: 「寧可讓它就此失落。」

translations.en: "What? What stories has that thief been telling you?"
translations.zh: 「什麼？那個盜賊都對汝說了些什麼謊言？」

translations.en: "He has no family--he's just a drifter!"
translations.zh: 「他根本沒有家人——他不過是個流浪漢！」

translations.en: "Don't be taken in by his @lies."
translations.zh: 「別被他的@lies（謊言）所騙。」

translations.en: "Tell him he's not fooling anyone."
translations.zh: 「告訴他，他騙不了任何人。」

translations.en: "Nicodemus the enchanter lives near here. His house lies between two rivers."
translations.zh: 「術士尼科德慕斯就住在附近。他的住所位於兩條河流之間。」

translations.en: "May you find that which thou deservest on thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願汝在任務中得到汝應得的一切。」

translations.en: "Noble Avatar, the affairs of state weigh heavily upon my time. Pray be precise in thy questioning."
translations.zh: 「尊貴的聖者，國務繁重，吾時間有限。請汝提問時開門見山。」

translations.en: "Noble Avatar, we hardly have time to chat about $Z in view of the perils facing our land!"
translations.zh: 「尊貴的聖者，面對本境的危難，吾等實在沒有閒工夫談論『$Z』！」

translations.en: "Hmpf! Well, mayhap 'twould be best for you to seek such wisdom elsewhere!"
translations.zh: 「哼！嗯，或許汝最好到別處去尋求此類智慧！」

translations.en: "Thou may return when thou seest fit to answer my question!"
translations.zh: 「等汝認為適合回答吾的問題時，再回來吧！」

translations.en: "Hmmm...well, no matter," she says suspiciously.
translations.zh: 「嗯……好吧，無所謂，」她狐疑地說道。

translations.en: "I suppose 'twould be improper to deny anything the Avatar requires."
translations.zh: 「吾想拒絕聖者所需之事，恐怕不甚妥當。」

translations.en: "The Mantra of Justice is 'beh.'"
translations.zh: 「正義咒語是『beh』。」

translations.en: "Very well then." Putting quill to parchment, she drafts a quick letter.*
translations.zh: 「好吧。」她提筆在羊皮紙上飛速草擬了一封信函。*

translations.en: "The jailer will now let you in, or verily shall he answer to me!"
translations.zh: 「獄卒現在會放汝進去，否則他將向吾交代！」

translations.en: "Then why dost thou waste my time with frivolous requests?!"
translations.zh: 「那汝為何以無聊的請求浪費吾的時間？！」

translations.en: "Begone, Avatar, and return when thou hast more serious business on thy mind!"
translations.zh: 「聖者，請退下，待汝有更正經的事情再來！」

translator_notes: 萊諾拉是尤城的傲慢女市長，言辭正式且帶貴族腔調。她拒絕以釋放盜賊換取正義聖符，認為此舉背叛正義本身。正義咒語『beh』保留原文。
